action.base_canvas: near-black with imperceptible cool undertone (#08-#10 range)
action.surface_strategy: luminance stepping (canvas -> panel -> elevated, +0.04 lightness per step)

action.usage_constraint: only on primary CTA, brand mark, key interactive accents

action.mono_letter_spacing: 0.54 to 0.6 px (positive — exception to global negative)

action.density_intent: tight (jarring proximity preferred over generous breathing)

action.easing: stable (no bounce, no overshoot, no spring)

action.primary_chromatic: warm earthy (terracotta-orange / mustard / oxidized-metal hue range 15-40°)

action.rgb_invariant: R approx G greater than B
